sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this shmup

special_mechanics.name: Shmup Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: As a shoot-em-up game, movement mechanics differ fundamentally from platformers. Player ship movement is not subject to gravity or traditional jump physics.

tier_notes: Tier 2 data source (Wikipedia) contains historical information about Darius II the Persian king, not the video game. No movement physics data available from provided sources.
extraction_error: Wikipedia article provided is about Darius II (Persian king, 423-404 BC), not Darius II (Sega Genesis video game). No game physics documentation available in source material.
